---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## The problem
What use case or pain point does this solve? Who is it for?

## The proposed feature
What should PromptMate do differently or additionally?

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you thought about and why you didn't choose them.

## Additional context
Mockups, examples from other tools, related issues.
